message:
feat(ftui-render): add deterministic fit-to-container and font metric lifecycle (bd-2vr05.14.1)

Fixed-point (1/256 px) pixel-to-cell conversion avoids floating-point
rounding ambiguity across platforms. CellMetrics, ContainerViewport,
FitPolicy, and MetricLifecycle provide a deterministic pipeline from
container resize / font-load / DPR-change events through to grid
dimension computation with generation-tracked cache invalidation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
